title: Qatari negotiating team in Tehran to help secure US-Iran deal to end war — Qatar returns to mediation after stepping back following Iranian strikes on Qatari LNG infrastructure
snippet: Qatar has returned to mediation efforts between the US and Iran after stepping back following Iranian strikes on Qatari LNG infrastructure. A Qatari negotiating team arrived in Tehran in coordination with the US to help resolve outstanding issues in the peace deal negotiations. Qatar's re-engagement adds a new diplomatic channel alongside Pakistan's ongoing mediation.
tag_reason: Qatar's return to US-Iran mediation is a new diplomatic development. Qatar had stepped back after Iranian strikes on its LNG infrastructure. Its re-entry alongside Pakistan's mediation changes the negotiation dynamics.
